name: Kitea
business_profile: Leading Moroccan furniture and decoration retailer with over 50 stores, specializing in home and office furniture including sofas.

name: Richbond
business_profile: Major Moroccan industrial group specializing in bedding, polyurethane foam, and sofas (especially traditional and modern Moroccan salons).

name: Dolidol (Uni Confort Maroc)
business_profile: Market leader in mattresses and foam in Morocco, also producing a wide range of sofas and seating solutions.

name: Decathlon Morocco
business_profile: Global sporting goods retailer with a strong presence in Morocco, importing a wide variety of equipment including yoga mats.

name: Marjane Group
business_profile: Largest retail conglomerate in Morocco, importing a wide range of consumer goods including home furniture and sports accessories.

name: Label'Vie (Carrefour Morocco)
business_profile: Second largest retail group in Morocco, operator of Carrefour franchises with extensive import operations for home and leisure goods.

name: IKEA Morocco
business_profile: Operated by SYH Morocco (Al-Homaizi Group), the world's largest furniture retailer has multiple stores in Morocco importing a vast range of sofas.

name: Bricoma
business_profile: Leading Moroccan DIY and home improvement retail chain with a significant section for home decoration and outdoor furniture.

name: Planet Sport
business_profile: Major Moroccan sports retail chain and distributor of international sports brands, importing fitness gear and accessories like yoga mats.

name: Bonbino Confort
business_profile: Specialist in foam, mattresses, and sofas (modern and traditional salons), based in Fez with national distribution.

name: City Sport Morocco
business_profile: Part of the Mercure International Group, a leading distributor of sporting goods and lifestyle brands in Morocco.

name: Mobilia Morocco
business_profile: Furniture and decoration retailer offering contemporary home solutions including a wide range of sofa sets.

name: Simo (Simmons Morocco)
business_profile: Licensee of the international Simmons brand in Morocco, specializing in high-end mattresses and convertible sofas.

name: Roche Bobois Morocco
business_profile: High-end furniture retailer specializing in designer sofas and premium home furnishings.

name: Maison du Monde Morocco
business_profile: International franchise specializing in stylish furniture and home decor, including diverse sofa collections.

name: Aswak Assalam
business_profile: Part of Ynna Holding, a major supermarket chain importing various household items including sports mats and basic furniture.

name: Bim Morocco
business_profile: Major hard-discount chain in Morocco, frequently importing seasonal household and sports items like yoga mats.

name: Inter-Meuble
business_profile: Casablanca-based company specializing in woodworking and furniture manufacturing/import for large projects.

name: Cousin Confort
business_profile: Retailer and manufacturer of sofas, chairs, and home furnishings with a focus on modern Moroccan interiors.

name: Fitness Boutique Morocco
business_profile: Specialized retailer for fitness equipment, supplements, and accessories including high-quality yoga mats.

name: Manatane
business_profile: Specialized furniture store offering modern home solutions and sofas.

name: Mobalpa Morocco
business_profile: Franchise of the French brand, specializing in fitted furniture including living room solutions.

name: Gautier Morocco
business_profile: High-end French furniture brand franchise with a strong focus on living room and bedroom furniture.

name: Kaizen Furniture
business_profile: Moroccan retailer focusing on functional and modern furniture designs.

name: Casa Morocco
business_profile: Franchise focusing on home decoration and small furniture items.

name: Zara Home Morocco
business_profile: Global brand for home textiles and furniture, importing high-end decor and small sofas.

name: Atlas Meubles
business_profile: Traditional and modern furniture retailer based in various Moroccan cities.

name: Meuble El Manar
business_profile: Furniture showroom specializing in home seating and sofas.

name: Deco Meuble
business_profile: Retailer of contemporary home furniture and decoration.

name: Prestige Meuble
business_profile: Luxury furniture store offering imported and local sofa designs.

name: Salons du Maroc
business_profile: Specialist in Moroccan salons and modern sofas.

name: Tempur Morocco
business_profile: Exclusive distributor of Tempur products, importing high-end seating and bedding.

name: Literie et Confort
business_profile: Retailer focusing on comfort-oriented furniture and sofas.

name: BoConcept Morocco
business_profile: Danish furniture brand franchise offering customizable sofas and chairs.

name: Ligne Roset Morocco
business_profile: International luxury brand for contemporary furniture.

name: Natuzzi Morocco
business_profile: Italian luxury sofa brand with showrooms in major Moroccan cities.

name: Go Sport Morocco
business_profile: Large sports retailer importing international brands for all sports including yoga.

name: Kaizen Sport
business_profile: Local sports retailer specializing in fitness and performance gear.

name: Alpha Sport
business_profile: Distributor and retailer of sports equipment and accessories.

name: Wellness Sport Club
business_profile: Premium gym chain that also imports and sells fitness accessories to members.

name: City Club
business_profile: Largest gym network in Morocco, importing vast quantities of mats and training gear.

name: Intersport Morocco
business_profile: Franchise of the global sports retail giant.

name: Adidas Morocco
business_profile: Official retail stores for Adidas products including accessories.

name: Nike Morocco
business_profile: Official retail stores for Nike products including accessories.

name: Courir Morocco
business_profile: Focuses on sneakers and sports-inspired lifestyle accessories.

name: JD Sports Morocco
business_profile: Global sports fashion retailer with stores in Morocco.

name: Casasport
business_profile: Casablanca-based retailer for general sports equipment.

name: Sport Avenue
business_profile: Retailer of international sports brands and fitness gear.

name: Urban Sport
business_profile: Focuses on urban fitness and lifestyle sports accessories.

name: BioTech Sport
business_profile: Imports sports supplements and fitness accessories including mats.
